articles.title_en: 39 hours in line for gas: One driver’s road trip through Russia’s fuel crisis
articles.lead_en: Since mid-June, Russian drivers have been spending hours — and even entire days — waiting in line at gas stations because of the fuel crisis. Vlad, a resident of Saint Petersburg, has been on the road for about a week, driving home with his wife from Vladivostok, where they bought a new car.
